name: Lamp
summary: A hero component with conic gradient light beams emanating from center, creating a lamp-like spotlight effect.
detailedDescription: Lamp Container creates a dramatic hero section with layered conic gradient light effects that resemble a lamp or spotlight. The component features two mirrored conic gradients - left side gradients from cyan-500 at 70deg to transparent, right side from 290deg to cyan-500. Both gradients animate width from 15rem to 30rem on view with 0.8s duration. Masked divs create sharp edges on the gradients using linear gradient masks (to_top, to_left, to_right). Multiple blur layers add depth: a 48px tall scale-x-150 blur at top, 10% opacity backdrop-blur layer, 36px cyan-500 rounded-full blur (50% opacity), and a 64px cyan-400 blur that animates width from 8rem to 16rem. A thin 0.5px cyan-400 line (30rem wide) animates across the center. Content is positioned at z-50, translated -80 units up from center, with children fading in from y:100. The container uses slate-950 background with min-h-screen height. This creates a theatrical spotlight effect perfect for product launches, hero announcements, or any content requiring dramatic illuminated presentation.
purpose: Illuminate content with conic gradient beams
Add theatrical lighting effects to presentations
behavior: Animates conic gradient width on view
Layers multiple blur elements for depth
Uses mask images for gradient clipping
Fades in content with y-axis animation
recommendations: Best for premium landing page sections and hero compositions.
